description_long: This is a single-story wooden cabin with a prominent dark brown gable roof and a stone foundation. The front facade features a covered porch with wooden railings and steps leading up to the entrance, flanked by stone columns. The side walls are finished in white plaster with a stone base, and each side has a single rectangular window with dark trim. The rear of the cabin is plain, with no visible windows or doors, emphasizing the simplicity of the structure. The roof extends with a generous overhang, providing shelter to the porch and adding to the rustic charm. The overall design combines natural wood, stone, and plaster, evoking a traditional, craftsman-inspired aesthetic.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a dark gable roof, stone foundation, covered front porch, and white plastered walls with single windows on each side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch with wooden railings, stone columns, central steps, and the main entrance under the gable roof.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a single rectangular window, white plaster wall, stone base, and the roof's overhang above the porch.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain white wall with a stone base and no windows or doors, dominated by the large gable roof.
description_view_3: Right side view with a single window, white plaster wall, stone base, and a partial view of the porch and entrance.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with deep overhangs, constructed from dark wood or shingles, featuring a single chimney
attribute_window_arrangement: Two single rectangular windows, one on each side wall, symmetrically placed and framed in dark trim
attribute_door_placement: One main door centered on the front facade, accessed via the porch steps
